act_vw_accountee_address_values.viewQuery:
SELECT accountee_id,GROUP_CONCAT(
DISTINCT TRIM(COALESCE(address_line_1, '') || 
CASE WHEN TRIM(COALESCE(address_line_2, '')) <> '' THEN ', ' || 
TRIM(address_line_2) ELSE '' END || 
CASE WHEN TRIM(COALESCE(postal_code, '')) <> '' THEN ', ' || 
TRIM(postal_code) ELSE '' END || 
CASE WHEN TRIM(COALESCE(city_name, '')) <> '' THEN ', ' 
|| TRIM(city_name) ELSE '' END || 
CASE WHEN TRIM(COALESCE(state_name, '')) <> '' THEN ', ' || 
TRIM(state_name) ELSE '' END || 
CASE WHEN TRIM(COALESCE(country_name, '')) <> '' THEN ', ' || 
TRIM(country_name) ELSE '' END )) AS accountee_addresses FROM act_accountee_addresses 
LEFT JOIN act_addresses ON act_addresses.address_id = act_accountee_addresses.address_id
WHERE address_line_1 IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(address_line_1) <> ''
GROUP BY accountee_id

act_vw_chargeable_service_categories.viewQuery:
SELECT

purchase_tax_rates.tax_rate_name AS purchase_tax_rate_name,

sale_tax_rates.tax_rate_percentage AS sale_tax_rate_percentage,
json_object('media_path', media_path,'media_details', media_details) AS chargeable_service_category_image_media,
act_chargeable_service_categories.* FROM act_chargeable_service_categories 
LEFT JOIN act_taxing_schemes as purchase_taxing_schemes ON act_chargeable_service_categories.purchase_taxing_scheme_id = purchase_taxing_schemes.taxing_scheme_id
LEFT JOIN act_taxing_schemes as sale_taxing_schemes ON act_chargeable_service_categories.sale_taxing_scheme_id = sale_taxing_schemes.taxing_scheme_id
LEFT JOIN act_tax_rates as purchase_tax_rates ON act_chargeable_service_categories.purchase_tax_rate_id = purchase_tax_rates.tax_rate_id
LEFT JOIN act_tax_rates as sale_tax_rates ON act_chargeable_service_categories.sale_tax_rate_id = sale_tax_rates.tax_rate_id 
LEFT JOIN act_medias ON act_chargeable_service_categories.chargeable_service_category_image_media_id = act_medias.media_id

act_vw_current_product_barcodes.viewQuery: SELECT * FROM (SELECT *,ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY product_id ORDER BY product_barcode_id ) AS row_number FROM act_product_barcodes WHERE is_active = 1 ) AS act_product_barcodes WHERE row_number = 1;

act_vw_current_product_prices.viewQuery: SELECT * FROM (SELECT *,ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY product_id ORDER BY product_price_id ) AS row_number FROM act_product_prices WHERE is_active = 1 ) AS act_product_prices WHERE row_number = 1;

act_vw_current_product_purchase_details.viewQuery:
SELECT act_product_purchase_details.*,
act_product_uoms.product_uom_name AS purchase_uom_name,
act_product_uoms.product_uom_quantity AS purchase_uom_quantity
 FROM (SELECT * FROM (SELECT *,ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY product_id ORDER BY product_purchase_detail_id ) AS rn FROM act_product_purchase_details WHERE is_active = 1 ) WHERE rn = 1) AS act_product_purchase_details 
LEFT JOIN act_product_uoms ON act_product_purchase_details.purchase_uom_id= act_product_uoms.product_uom_id

act_vw_current_product_sale_details.viewQuery:
SELECT act_product_sale_details.*,
act_product_uoms.product_uom_name AS sale_uom_name,
act_product_uoms.product_uom_quantity AS sale_uom_quantity
 FROM (SELECT * FROM (SELECT *,ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY product_id ORDER BY product_sale_detail_id ) AS rn FROM act_product_sale_details WHERE is_active = 1 ) WHERE rn = 1) AS act_product_sale_details
LEFT JOIN act_product_uoms ON act_product_sale_details.sale_uom_id= act_product_uoms.product_uom_id

act_vw_current_product_stock_details.viewQuery:

FROM (SELECT * FROM (SELECT *,ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY product_id ORDER BY product_stock_detail_id ) AS rn FROM act_product_stock_details WHERE is_current = 1 ) WHERE rn = 1) AS act_product_stock_details

act_vw_customers.viewQuery: SELECT act_customers.customer_id,act_customers.customer_category,act_customers.customer_remarks, act_vw_parties.* FROM act_customers LEFT JOIN act_vw_parties ON act_customers.party_id = act_vw_parties.party_id

act_vw_delivery_note_chargeable_services.viewQuery:
SELECT
    COALESCE(dncs.chargeable_service_quantity, 0) AS chargeable_service_quantity,

    act_chargeable_services.chargeable_service_name,
    act_chargeable_service_uoms.chargeable_service_uom_name,

    dncs.*

FROM act_delivery_note_chargeable_services dncs
LEFT JOIN act_chargeable_services
    ON dncs.chargeable_service_id = act_chargeable_services.chargeable_service_id
LEFT JOIN act_chargeable_service_uoms
    ON dncs.chargeable_service_uom_id = act_chargeable_service_uoms.chargeable_service_uom_id;

act_vw_delivery_note_expenses.viewQuery:
SELECT
    act_vw_ledger_accounts.ledger_account_name,
    act_delivery_note_expenses.*
FROM act_delivery_note_expenses
LEFT JOIN act_vw_ledger_accounts
    ON act_delivery_note_expenses.ledger_account_id =
       act_vw_ledger_accounts.ledger_account_id;

act_vw_delivery_note_products.viewQuery:
SELECT
    COALESCE(dnp.product_quantity, 0) AS product_quantity,

    act_products.product_name,
    act_products.hsn_code,
    act_product_uoms.product_uom_name,

    dnp.*

FROM act_delivery_note_products dnp
LEFT JOIN act_products
    ON dnp.product_id = act_products.product_id
LEFT JOIN act_product_uoms
    ON dnp.product_uom_id = act_product_uoms.product_uom_id;

act_vw_delivery_note_summary.viewQuery:
SELECT
    dn.delivery_note_id,

    IFNULL(p.products_count, 0) AS products_count

FROM act_delivery_notes dn

LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT
        delivery_note_id,
        COUNT(delivery_note_product_id) AS products_count
    FROM act_delivery_note_products
    GROUP BY delivery_note_id
) p
    ON p.delivery_note_id = dn.delivery_note_id;

act_vw_delivery_notes.viewQuery:
SELECT
    act_vw_customers.customer_category,
    act_vw_customers.party_name,
    act_vw_customers.party_id,
    act_vw_customers.legal_identifier,

    act_addresses.address_line_1,
    act_addresses.address_line_2,
    act_addresses.landmark,
    act_addresses.latitude,
    act_addresses.longitude,
    act_addresses.city_name,
    act_addresses.postal_code,
    act_addresses.state_name,
    act_addresses.country_name,

    act_delivery_notes.*

FROM act_delivery_notes
LEFT JOIN act_vw_customers
    ON act_delivery_notes.customer_id = act_vw_customers.customer_id
LEFT JOIN act_addresses
    ON act_delivery_notes.address_id = act_addresses.address_id;

act_vw_employees.viewQuery: SELECT act_employees.employee_id,act_employees.employee_code, act_employees.date_of_birth, act_employees.date_of_joining, act_employees.salary_duration, act_employees.employee_designation, act_employees.employee_remarks, act_employees.employee_salary_amount, act_employees.employee_gender, act_vw_parties.* FROM act_employees LEFT JOIN act_vw_parties ON act_employees.party_id = act_vw_parties.party_id

act_vw_inventory_tracking_entries.viewQuery:
SELECT 
((CASE WHEN act_inventory_tracking_entries.in_total_quantity IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE act_inventory_tracking_entries.in_total_quantity END)-
(CASE WHEN act_inventory_tracking_entries.out_total_quantity IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE act_inventory_tracking_entries.out_total_quantity END)) AS net_total_quantity,
((CASE WHEN act_inventory_tracking_entries.available_stock_quantity >0 THEN act_inventory_tracking_entries.available_stock_quantity ELSE 0 END) * 
(CASE WHEN act_inventory_tracking_entries.product_price_final > 0 THEN act_inventory_tracking_entries.product_price_final ELSE 0 END)) AS available_stock_value,
act_inventory_trackings.product_id,
act_inventory_trackings.inventory_tracking_datetime,
act_inventory_trackings.is_draft,
act_inventory_tracking_entries.* FROM act_inventory_tracking_entries LEFT JOIN act_inventory_trackings ON act_inventory_tracking_entries.inventory_tracking_id = act_inventory_trackings.inventory_tracking_id

act_vw_ledger_account_summary.viewQuery:
SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN is_credit = 1 THEN  transaction_entry_amount * -1 ELSE transaction_entry_amount END) AS balance,
SUM(CASE WHEN is_credit = 1 THEN  0 ELSE 1 END) AS debit_entries_count,
SUM(CASE WHEN is_credit = 0 THEN  0 ELSE 1 END) AS credit_entries_count,
ledger_account_id
 FROM act_transaction_entries GROUP BY ledger_account_id

act_vw_purchase_order_products.viewQuery:
SELECT
    (
        COALESCE(pop.product_quantity, 0) *
        COALESCE(pop.product_price_gross, 0)
    ) AS gross_amount,

    (
        (
            COALESCE(pop.product_quantity, 0) *
            COALESCE(pop.product_price_gross, 0)
        ) * (COALESCE(pop.discount_trade_percentage, 0) / 100)
    ) AS discount_trade_amount,

    (
        (
            (
                COALESCE(pop.product_quantity, 0) *
                COALESCE(pop.product_price_gross, 0)
            ) * (1 - (COALESCE(pop.discount_trade_percentage, 0) / 100))
        ) * (COALESCE(pop.discount_cash_percentage, 0) / 100)
    ) AS discount_cash_amount,

    (
        (
            (
                (
                    COALESCE(pop.product_quantity, 0) *
                    COALESCE(pop.product_price_gross, 0)
                ) * (1 - (COALESCE(pop.discount_trade_percentage, 0) / 100))
            ) * (1 - (COALESCE(pop.discount_cash_percentage, 0) / 100))
        ) * (COALESCE(pop.discount_rebate_percentage, 0) / 100)
    ) AS discount_rebate_amount,

    (
        (
            (
                (
                    COALESCE(pop.product_quantity, 0) *
                    COALESCE(pop.product_price_gross, 0)
                ) * (1 - (COALESCE(pop.discount_trade_percentage, 0) / 100))
            ) * (1 - (COALESCE(pop.discount_cash_percentage, 0) / 100))
        ) * (1 - (COALESCE(pop.discount_rebate_percentage, 0) / 100))
    ) AS taxable_amount,

    (
        (
            (
                (
                    COALESCE(pop.product_quantity, 0) *
                    COALESCE(pop.product_price_gross, 0)
                ) * (1 - (COALESCE(pop.discount_trade_percentage, 0) / 100))
            ) * (1 - (COALESCE(pop.discount_cash_percentage, 0) / 100))
        ) * (1 - (COALESCE(pop.discount_rebate_percentage, 0) / 100))
        * (COALESCE(pop.tax_rate_percentage, 0) / 100)
    ) AS tax_amount,

    act_vw_products.product_name,
    act_vw_products.product_image_media,
    act_vw_products.hsn_code,
    act_taxing_schemes.taxing_scheme_name,
    act_tax_rates.tax_rate_name,
    act_product_uoms.product_uom_name,
    pop.*

FROM act_purchase_order_products pop
LEFT JOIN act_vw_products
    ON pop.product_id = act_vw_products.product_id
LEFT JOIN act_product_uoms
    ON pop.product_uom_id = act_product_uoms.product_uom_id
LEFT JOIN act_taxing_schemes
    ON pop.taxing_scheme_id = act_taxing_schemes.taxing_scheme_id
LEFT JOIN act_tax_rates
    ON pop.tax_rate_id = act_tax_rates.tax_rate_id;

act_vw_sale_quotation_chargeable_service.viewQuery:
SELECT
    (
        COALESCE(sqcs.chargeable_service_quantity, 0) *
        COALESCE(sqcs.chargeable_service_charge_gross, 0)
    ) AS gross_amount,

    (
        (
            COALESCE(sqcs.chargeable_service_quantity, 0) *
            COALESCE(sqcs.chargeable_service_charge_gross, 0)
        ) * (COALESCE(sqcs.discount_trade_percentage, 0) / 100)
    ) AS discount_trade_amount,

    (
        (
            (
                COALESCE(sqcs.chargeable_service_quantity, 0) *
                COALESCE(sqcs.chargeable_service_charge_gross, 0)
            ) * (1 - (COALESCE(sqcs.discount_trade_percentage, 0) / 100))
        ) * (COALESCE(sqcs.discount_cash_percentage, 0) / 100)
    ) AS discount_cash_amount,

    (
        (
            (
                (
                    COALESCE(sqcs.chargeable_service_quantity, 0) *
                    COALESCE(sqcs.chargeable_service_charge_gross, 0)
                ) * (1 - (COALESCE(sqcs.discount_trade_percentage, 0) / 100))
            ) * (1 - (COALESCE(sqcs.discount_cash_percentage, 0) / 100))
        ) * (COALESCE(sqcs.discount_rebate_percentage, 0) / 100)
    ) AS discount_rebate_amount,

    (
        (
            (
                (
                    COALESCE(sqcs.chargeable_service_quantity, 0) *
                    COALESCE(sqcs.chargeable_service_charge_gross, 0)
                ) * (1 - (COALESCE(sqcs.discount_trade_percentage, 0) / 100))
            ) * (1 - (COALESCE(sqcs.discount_cash_percentage, 0) / 100))
        ) * (1 - (COALESCE(sqcs.discount_rebate_percentage, 0) / 100))
    ) AS taxable_amount,

    (
        (
            (
                (
                    COALESCE(sqcs.chargeable_service_quantity, 0) *
                    COALESCE(sqcs.chargeable_service_charge_gross, 0)
                ) * (1 - (COALESCE(sqcs.discount_trade_percentage, 0) / 100))
            ) * (1 - (COALESCE(sqcs.discount_cash_percentage, 0) / 100))
        ) * (1 - (COALESCE(sqcs.discount_rebate_percentage, 0) / 100))
        * (COALESCE(sqcs.tax_rate_percentage, 0) / 100)
    ) AS tax_amount,

    act_chargeable_services.chargeable_service_name,
    act_taxing_schemes.taxing_scheme_name,
    act_tax_rates.tax_rate_name,
    act_chargeable_service_uoms.chargeable_service_uom_name,
    sqcs.*

FROM act_sale_quotation_chargeable_services sqcs
LEFT JOIN act_chargeable_services
    ON sqcs.chargeable_service_id = act_chargeable_services.chargeable_service_id
LEFT JOIN act_chargeable_service_uoms
    ON sqcs.chargeable_service_uom_id = act_chargeable_service_uoms.chargeable_service_uom_id
LEFT JOIN act_taxing_schemes
    ON sqcs.taxing_scheme_id = act_taxing_schemes.taxing_scheme_id
LEFT JOIN act_tax_rates
    ON sqcs.tax_rate_id = act_tax_rates.tax_rate_id;

act_vw_stock.viewQuery:
SELECT 
SUM(in_total_quantity) AS in_total_quantity, 
SUM(out_total_quantity) AS out_total_quantity, 
SUM(IIF(in_total_quantity IS NULL,0,in_total_quantity) - IIF(out_total_quantity IS NULL,0,out_total_quantity)) AS total_closing_stock, 
(SUM(IIF(in_total_quantity IS NULL,0,in_quantity) - IIF(out_total_quantity IS NULL,0,out_total_quantity)) / IIF(act_vw_current_product_stock_details.stock_uom_quantity IS NULL,1,act_vw_current_product_stock_details.stock_uom_quantity)) AS closing_stock,
act_vw_current_product_stock_details.stock_uom_id, act_vw_current_product_stock_details.stock_uom_name, act_vw_current_product_stock_details.stock_uom_quantity,
act_vw_products.* FROM act_vw_products 
LEFT JOIN act_vw_inventory_tracking_entries ON act_vw_products.product_id = act_vw_inventory_tracking_entries.product_id 
LEFT JOIN act_vw_current_product_stock_details ON act_vw_current_product_stock_details.product_id = act_vw_products.product_id 
GROUP BY act_vw_products.product_id

act_vw_transaction_credit_entries.viewQuery: SELECT SUM(transaction_entry_amount) as credit_amount,count(ledger_account_id) AS entries_count,ledger_account_id,transaction_id FROM act_transaction_entries GROUP BY transaction_id,ledger_account_id HAVING is_credit = 1

act_vw_transaction_debit_entries.viewQuery: SELECT SUM(transaction_entry_amount) as debit_amount,count(ledger_account_id) AS entries_count, ledger_account_id,transaction_id FROM act_transaction_entries GROUP BY transaction_id,ledger_account_id HAVING is_credit=0

act_vw_transaction_entries.viewQuery:
SELECT 
CASE WHEN act_transaction_entries.transaction_entry_description IS NULL OR act_transaction_entries.transaction_entry_description = '' THEN act_transactions.transaction_narration ELSE act_transaction_entries.transaction_entry_description END AS transaction_entry_narration, 
CASE WHEN is_credit = 0 THEN  act_vw_ledger_accounts.ledger_account_name ELSE '' END AS debit_ledger_account_name,
CASE WHEN is_credit = 0 THEN  act_vw_ledger_accounts.ledger_account_type_name ELSE '' END AS debit_ledger_account_type_name,
CASE WHEN is_credit = 0 THEN  act_vw_ledger_accounts.reflecting_statement ELSE '' END AS debit_reflecting_statement,
CASE WHEN is_credit = 0 THEN  act_vw_ledger_accounts.ledger_account_balance ELSE 0 END AS debit_ledger_account_balance,
CASE WHEN is_credit = 0 THEN  act_transaction_entries.transaction_entry_amount ELSE 0 END AS debit_amount,
CASE WHEN is_credit = 1 THEN  act_vw_ledger_accounts.ledger_account_name ELSE '' END AS credit_ledger_account_name,
CASE WHEN is_credit = 1 THEN  act_vw_ledger_accounts.ledger_account_type_name ELSE '' END AS credit_ledger_account_type_name,
CASE WHEN is_credit = 1 THEN  act_vw_ledger_accounts.reflecting_statement ELSE '' END AS credit_reflecting_statement,
CASE WHEN is_credit = 1 THEN  act_vw_ledger_accounts.ledger_account_balance ELSE 0 END AS credit_ledger_account_balance,
CASE WHEN is_credit = 1 THEN  act_transaction_entries.transaction_entry_amount ELSE 0 END AS credit_amount,
act_vw_ledger_accounts.ledger_account_name,
act_vw_ledger_accounts.ledger_account_type_name,
act_vw_ledger_accounts.reflecting_statement,
act_transactions.accountee_id,
act_transactions.transaction_narration,
act_transactions.transaction_time,
act_transactions.transaction_type,
act_transactions.debit_ledger_accounts,
act_transactions.credit_ledger_accounts,
act_transaction_entries.* FROM act_transaction_entries 
LEFT JOIN act_transactions ON act_transactions.transaction_id = act_transaction_entries.transaction_id
LEFT JOIN act_vw_ledger_accounts ON act_transaction_entries.ledger_account_id = act_vw_ledger_accounts.ledger_account_id

act_vw_transaction_summary.viewQuery:
SELECT act_transactions.transaction_id, total_debit_amount, total_credit_amount, total_debit_entries_count, total_credit_entries_count, reflecting_debit_ledger_accounts, reflecting_credit_ledger_accounts FROM act_transactions LEFT JOIN
(SELECT SUM(transaction_entry_amount) AS total_debit_amount,COUNT(transaction_entry_id) AS total_debit_entries_count,GROUP_CONCAT(ledger_account_name,', ') AS reflecting_debit_ledger_accounts, transaction_id FROM act_vw_transaction_entries WHERE is_credit=0 GROUP BY transaction_id) AS debit_summary
ON act_transactions.transaction_id = debit_summary.transaction_id LEFT JOIN 
(SELECT SUM(transaction_entry_amount) AS total_credit_amount,COUNT(transaction_entry_id) AS total_credit_entries_count,GROUP_CONCAT(ledger_account_name,', ') AS reflecting_credit_ledger_accounts, transaction_id FROM act_vw_transaction_entries WHERE is_credit=1 GROUP BY transaction_id) AS credit_summary
ON act_transactions.transaction_id = credit_summary.transaction_id
